description.hr: FINAL POLISH: Finalne pripreme za deploy - ispravljeni QR URL-ovi i pripremljen build.
description.en: FINAL POLISH: Final deploy preparations - fixed QR URLs and prepared build.

description.hr: QR REDIRECTS & POLISH: Ispravljeni stari QR URL-ovi (buraplavac.html, RukatacBura.html), fiksni prikaz regije, poboljšana vidljivost verzije u footeru.
description.en: QR REDIRECTS & POLISH: Fixed old QR URLs (buraplavac.html, RukatacBura.html), fixed region display, improved footer version visibility.

description.hr: POLISH & QUALITY: Implementirana 404 stranica, unificirani fini URL-ovi, ispravljene TypeScript greške i dodani vizualni fallbackovi.
description.en: POLISH & QUALITY: Implemented 404 page, unified fine URLs, fixed TypeScript errors and added visual fallbacks.

description.hr: DARK THEME & CAROUSEL: Kompletna revizija Dark & Gold teme, implementiran Wine Carousel, pojednostavljen mobilni meni, uklonjeni logotipovi.
description.en: DARK THEME & CAROUSEL: Complete Dark & Gold theme revision, Wine Carousel implementation, simplified mobile menu, logo removed.

description.hr: EU COMPLIANCE & i18n SYNC: Implementirano vizualno isticanje alergena, puna sinkronizacija engleskih vina s identičnim slugovima.
description.en: EU COMPLIANCE & i18n SYNC: Implemented visual allergen highlighting, full English wine synchronization with identical slugs.

description.hr: SMART ROUTING & QR READY: Podrška za kose crte u slugovima, Borisov LOT i datum punjenja.
description.en: SMART ROUTING & QR READY: Support for slashes in slugs, Boris LOT, and filling date.

description.hr: LAB & UI EXPANSION: Dodana laboratorijska analiza i nutritivni podaci (EU).
description.en: LAB & UI EXPANSION: Added laboratory analysis and nutritional data (EU).
